github.description: Full GitHub API — repos, issues, PRs, code search, commits, releases

filesystem.description: Read/write CMNDCENTER, memory, and Claude config dirs

playwright.description: Browser automation — scrape markets, test UIs, capture screenshots

supabase.description: Direct Supabase DB — query sessions, opportunities, trade_signals, wand_content

postgres.description: Raw PostgreSQL — full query access to structured memory store

notion.description: Notion workspace — AMSA brain, project tracking, knowledge base

docker.description: Docker — start/stop services, inspect containers, manage stack

brave-search.description: Live web search — market trends, product research, competitor analysis

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph memory — entities, relations, observations

sequential-thinking.description: Multi-step reasoning — breaks complex problems into sequential thought chains

fetch.description: HTTP fetch — call any API, webhook, or endpoint from Claude

sqlite.description: Local SQLite — fast local queries on patterns, sessions, queue items

everything.description: MCP test server with all capability types — used for integration testing
